title: Inspect Multiple Files
description: A multi-file inspection should reference both implementation and test context.
prompt: Inspect src/orchestrator/request-mutator.ts and its test, then explain how cache_control breakpoints are asserted.

workspace_files.content: The request mutator walks sorted prompt regions, appends cache_control metadata at selected block boundaries, and preserves the original message content when no breakpoint is requested.
The tests assert that the mutator places two cache_control markers for stable and semi-stable regions while leaving unrelated tool result payloads byte-identical.
